Stories Tagged "Water Creature"

A focused archive path for Water Creature, collecting 4 related Kyunolab records across 2 shelfves.

Mythic Creatures

Kappa Folklore: Japanese Water Creature, Warnings, and Common Versions

A source-aware Kyunolab record tracing the Japanese water creature tradition tied to rivers, manners, danger, and protective warning stories.

Mythic Creatures - 9 min read
Mythic Creatures

The Ash-Feathered Crow of Old Roofs: A Creature Folklore Meaning

A careful folklore reading of an ash-feathered crow lands on old roofs before families hear news from far away.

Mythic Creatures - 10 min read
Mythic Creatures

The White-Toed Cat That Crosses Grave Paths: A Mythic Creature Explained

A careful folklore reading of a white-toed cat crosses grave paths before a family returns an old object.

Mythic Creatures - 11 min read
Modern Legends

The Lake Monster in the Tourist Camera: A Modern Sighting Legend

A blurred shape on the water, a tourist photo, and a town that knows exactly what people will ask.
